methods.CharSequence getAccessibilityClassName(): Return the class name of this object to be used for accessibility purposes.
methods.boolean getFreezesText(): Return whether this text view is including its entire text contents in frozen icicles.
methods.Editable getText(): Return the text that TextView is displaying.
methods.boolean isStyleShortcutEnabled(): Return true if style shortcut is enabled, otherwise returns false.
methods.boolean onKeyShortcut(int keyCode, KeyEv: Called on the focused view when a key shortcut event is not handled.
methods.boolean onTextContextMenuItem(int id): Called when a context menu option for the text view is selected.
methods.void setEllipsize(TextUtils.TruncateAt e: Causes words in the text that are longer than the view's width to be ellipsized instead of broken in the middle.
methods.void setStyleShortcutsEnabled(boolean en: Enables styls shortcuts, e.g. Ctrl+B for making text bold.
methods.void setText(CharSequence text, TextView: Sets the text to be displayed and the TextView.BufferType.
